title: Rename the Harness CLI and minimize runtime UI
goal: Ship the existing npm distribution as Harness, invoked with hrn, with Pi startup resource UI hidden and explicit agent progress communication.

acceptanceCriteria.description: A packed npm installation exposes hrn as the supported executable; its help and diagnostics identify Harness without changing the existing npm package, state-path, or Homebrew package contracts.

A normal Harness runtime launch writes quietStartup: true in its isolated agent settings before Pi starts, so Pi's startup header (including Context, Skills, and Extensions) is hidden unless the user explicitly requests Pi --verbose.

The bundled runtime guidance requires concise user-visible progress updates before tool calls and after material findings, including the intended tool and outcome-level purpose without exposing private chain-of-thought.
Focused packed-CLI coverage and the repository-required npm test suite pass without including the pre-existing untracked pnpm-lock.yaml in the change.
The verified change is committed on a branch and submitted as a Conventional Commit-titled pull request.

workUnits.title: Implement CLI branding and quiet startup
Verify, review, commit, and open pull request
